name: Marcus T.
text: Finally someone talking about tax-loss harvesting. I've saved over $8k in taxes the last two years using this strategy and most of my friends have no idea it exists.

name: Jennifer K.
text: Great article but I'm confused about the difference between qualified and non-qualified dividends. Can anyone explain how this affects someone with a moderate portfolio around $150k?

name: David R.
text: The municipal bond section was eye-opening. Been in index funds for 15 years and never considered how much I'm losing to taxes each year.

name: Sarah M.
text: I respectfully disagree with the asset location strategy for most people. Unless you have significant wealth, the complexity isn't worth the 1-2% savings.

name: Thomas B.
text: Using a taxable account strategically combined with my 401k has genuinely changed my passive income game. Wish I'd optimized this sooner.
